name: verdict-ceo-proposal-sentry-digest
title: Verdict: dismiss on CEO proposal sentry-digest
hook: Operator dismissed the CEO proposal to add a sentry-digest job (issue #3467).
body:
**Proposal:** sentry-digest
**Decision:** dismiss
**Source issue:** #3467

The operator dismissed this CEO proposal. The CEO must not re-surface the same slug for at least 30 days, and only then if signal grows.
